items.name: Ice Staff
items.description: Click on a location within 64 studs of your character to create a large wall of ice. The ice is slippery and nigh impossible to climb. Use it to block off corridors and routes of escape!

items.name: Shadow Sword
items.description: Equipping the Shadow Sword shrouds your character in darkness. You immediately transform into a warrior wearing a jet-black suit and begin emitting a cloud of dark fog. While your appearance unnerves and disorients your opponents, each sword strike does 35 points of damage and pressing space twice teleports you forward.

items.name: Blizzard Striker
items.description: Everywhere you go, the freezing snow follows. Anyone who gets close to you while you are wielding this sword will lose health due to the pain of being near your icy cold weapon.  Click to slash at your enemies, dealing around 15 damage per hit. There is a 20% chance your enemy will freeze into a block of ice for 15 seconds. This disables control over his character, making him unable to move and very vulnerable to your frozen attacks.  Let it go, indeed!

items.description: You've captured the mystical chupacabra and now he does your bidding.   He still disappears on occasion, but when you click, he will attack your foes.  If you click another character, the chupacabra will attack it until it dies.
